summary: Recorded the post-PR #345 learning that migration and contract-bearing repository work requires a proactive test-contract impact sweep before PR readiness is claimed.

task.request: Update RECENT_LEARNINGS.md and the GitHub Diamond bundle so proactive test-contract impact sweeps are required for change, update and migration work without making the rule GOV.UK-specific.

decisions.reason: The failure mode applies to any contract-bearing change, not only GOV.UK migrations.

decisions.decision: Add a dedicated always-loaded GitHub Diamond reference file.
decisions.reason: This keeps the sweep checklist explicit and reusable without overloading the main prompt body.
The repository uses this file as operational memory for repeatable agent failure modes.

decisions.decision: Use an approved chore branch after initially noticing an unapproved docs branch prefix.
decisions.reason: The operating model permits chore/ branches for repository-affecting documentation and governance work.

connectorVerification: Confirmed the branch starts from the PR #345 merge commit on main.
Confirmed the changed-file list is limited to governance, learning and trace files.
Confirmed RECENT_LEARNINGS.md contains the 2026-06-04 proactive test-contract impact sweep learning.
Confirmed GitHub Diamond prompt spec is version 2.9.5 and loads references/test-contract-impact-sweep.xml.
Confirmed GitHub Diamond prompt body includes mandatory sequence and required-output references to the sweep.

residualRisk: The PR should not be considered complete until normal checks pass on the branch head.
